phase: R5 — separate buyer wallet from merchant register

buyer_home_clean.id_card: shows only handle (name.cowrie) + Claim action; removed 'SETTLES IN ₦·€·$' and '$0.00 FEE' merchant framing
buyer_home_clean.claim_button: shortened to 'Claim', decorative dot removed so it renders fully (not clipped)

role_switch.buyer_to_merchant: separated 'SWITCH ROLE → Merchant register' in the sidebar (and a distinct dashed 'Merchant' tab in the mobile nav) — not mixed with wallet nav (Home/Pay/Verify)
role_switch.merchant_to_buyer: '← Buyer wallet' role switch in the register header (symmetric)
role_switch.removed: redundant in-wallet merchant link; the buyer-side 'Privacy' nav that routed into the register

merchant_register_standalone: COWRIE REGISTER shows merchant sign-in + invoices + payout + merchant USDC balance + settlement/fee framing; NO buyer wallet, balance, or ID card
e2e: R5 ROLE SEPARATION ✓ — clean home (no merchant link, no settles/fee, Claim un-clipped, separated role switch), standalone register (no buyer elements), role switch round-trips both ways, full loop across the switch (deposit $50, invoice as Acme Foods, pay $25, merchant real USDC Δ +25.00, register flipped, receipt ok), state isolated (cowrie.wallet.v1 + cowrie.merchant.v1 both persist)
